name: Generic Tool Card
summary: Fallback tool card for rendering unrecognized or custom tool execution results
goals: Render any tool execution result that does not have a specialized card
Display tool name, input, and output in a generic but readable format

specDetail.description: A generic fallback tool card component that renders tool execution results for tools without specialized card components. Displays the tool name, input parameters as JSON, and output content.

parameters.name: toolName
parameters.description: Name of the tool that was executed

parameters.name: input
parameters.description: Input parameters passed to the tool

constraints: Must gracefully render any JSON-serializable input and output
Must truncate output exceeding 500 lines with expand option
Must show status indicator (spinner for running, checkmark for success, X for error)

acceptanceCriteria.given: an unrecognized tool execution result is received
acceptanceCriteria.when: the generic tool card is rendered
acceptanceCriteria.then: the tool name, input, output, and status are displayed in a structured format

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
